report_name: Israel's State Comptroller Report Reveals "Severe" Cybersecurity Gaps in Emergency Agencies

identities.name: Israel Police
identities.description: Identified in the State Comptroller's report as having significant cybersecurity deficiencies as an emergency service agency.

identities.name: Israel Fire and Rescue Authority
identities.description: Identified in the State Comptroller's report as having significant cybersecurity deficiencies as an emergency service agency.

identities.name: Courts Administration
identities.description: Identified in the State Comptroller's report as having significant cybersecurity deficiencies.

identities.name: Ministry of Economy and Industry
identities.description: Identified in the State Comptroller's report as having significant cybersecurity deficiencies.

identities.name: National Digital Directorate
identities.description: Identified in the State Comptroller's report as having significant cybersecurity deficiencies, including its Government Cyber Defense Unit.

identities.name: Prime Minister's Office
identities.description: Identified in the State Comptroller's report as having significant cybersecurity deficiencies.

identities.name: Privacy Protection Authority
identities.description: Identified in the State Comptroller's report as having significant cybersecurity deficiencies.

identities.name: Tax Authority
identities.description: Specifically called out in the State Comptroller's report for using a fragmented, separate authentication system, which increases cyber risk.

identities.name: National Insurance Institute
identities.description: Specifically called out in the State Comptroller's report for using a fragmented, separate authentication system.

identities.name: Defense Ministry
identities.description: Specifically called out in the State Comptroller's report for using a fragmented, separate authentication system, which increases cyber risk.
